rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0010
rows.name:
It seems to be another record
from the Ancient Samaarians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0020
rows.name:
"The six wedges shall strip away
all of this one's omniscience."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0030
rows.name:
"Even an immortal Samaar
cannot escape these wedges."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0040
rows.name:
"This one's consciousness will be eternally extinguished,
and his existence will meet its end within the rift."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0060
rows.name:
The Ancient Samaarians intended to lock
Void away for eternity using this prison.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0080
rows.name: Did some sort of anomaly occur[ST:wide ]—?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0090
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—There is no use thinking about it now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0100
rows.name:
At the very least, this device
certainly has an effect on Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0110
rows.name: The wisdom left behind by Ancient Samaar[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200130_MSG0120
rows.name: We'll put it to good use.[ST:wait ]
